# UiHost.DialectMessageClass enumeration

The class an incoming dialect message validates into.

```csharp
public enum DialectMessageClass
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Request | `0` | A JSON-RPC request naming a known dialect method. |
| Notification | `1` | A JSON-RPC notification naming a known dialect method. |
| Response | `2` | A JSON-RPC response (success or error); responses carry no method. |
